triageFlags.title: Loan-to-Value (LTV) Calculation Missing
triageFlags.description: The Loan-to-Value percentage is not calculated in the proposal.
triageFlags.recommendation: Calculate the LTV using the formula provided in the policy and ensure it meets the maximum allowable percentage for the applicant's credit tier.
triageFlags.reasoning: The policy specifies that LTV is calculated as (Total Advance) / (Vehicle Trade Price). This value is critical for assessing the proposal against the maximum allowable LTV for the applicant's credit tier.

triageFlags.title: Debt-to-Income (DTI) Ratio Missing
triageFlags.description: The Debt-to-Income ratio is not calculated in the proposal.
triageFlags.recommendation: Calculate the DTI using the formula provided in the policy and ensure it meets the maximum allowable percentage for the applicant's credit tier.
triageFlags.reasoning: The policy specifies that DTI is calculated as (Total Monthly Credit Commitments + Proposed Monthly Instalment) / Verified Net Monthly Income. This value is critical for assessing affordability and compliance with the policy.

content.reasoning: The analysis identified missing calculations for Loan-to-Value (LTV) and Debt-to-Income (DTI) ratios, which are critical for compliance with underwriting policies. These omissions prevent a complete assessment of the proposal's adherence to the company's lending criteria.
